page_metadata.biotools__summary: Iamxt is an array-based max-tree toolbox implemented in Python using the NumPy library for array processing. It can be used in mathematical morphology research and image processing.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Iamxt is an array-based max-tree toolbox implemented in Python using the NumPy library for array processing. It can be used in mathematical morphology research and image processing.
